assistant_message.content:
{
  "finding_id": "openscap_040",
  "is_optimal": false,
  "approve": true,
  "feedback": "The remediation sets the correct ownership and mode (0400) for /etc/shadow, which resolves the vulnerability. The plan is sound, but minor improvements can be made.",
  "concerns": [
    "Backup location is in the same directory and could be overwritten by later scripts",
    "The optional SELinux context check is not included in the scripted steps",
    "Reliance on symbolic chmod may lead to human error; numeric mode is safer"
  ],
  "suggested_improvements": [
    "Store the backup in a dedicated backup directory such as /var/backups with a timestamped name",
    "Add a step to verify and restore the SELinux context (e.g., restorecon -v /etc/shadow)",
    "Prefer using numeric chmod 0400 instead of the symbolic representation"
  ],
  "security_score": 9,
  "best_practices": true
}
